parameters.description: Send notifications to your own LaMetric destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise lametrics:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a LaMetric device notification JSON body and post it to your LaMetric device API (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"model":{"cycles":1,"frames":[{"icon":0,"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}]}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your LaMetric device API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment LaMetric destinations, direct

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's LaMetric apikey

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's LaMetric host
